cd /tmp/sv-338158e1898046e7b06a5229903fe365 && python3 -c "
import subprocess
# Use nm -D to get all dynamic symbols with addresses, then find closest match
result = subprocess.run(['nm', '-D', '--defined-only', 'libmonosgen-2.0.so'], capture_output=True, text=True)
syms = []
for line in result.stdout.strip().split('\n'):
    parts = line.split()
    if len(parts) >= 3:
        addr = int(parts[0], 16)
        name = parts[2]
        syms.append((addr, name))
syms.sort()

targets = [0x222098, 0x2241ac, 0x1abc80, 0x16de04, 0x2f4b20, 0x2f4c84, 0x2c1a40]
import bisect
addrs_only = [s[0] for s in syms]
for t in targets:
    idx = bisect.bisect_right(addrs_only, t) - 1
    if idx >= 0:
        base_addr, name = syms[idx]
        offset = t - base_addr
        print(f'0x{t:x} -> {name}+0x{offset:x}  (base: 0x{base_addr:x})')
    else:
        print(f'0x{t:x} -> ???')
"
